prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Integrated Urgent Care Aggregate Data Collection is applicable to Scotland as it pertains to integrated health services like NHS 111, which operates across the UK, including Scotland. The data collection supports the monitoring and performance evaluation of urgent care services, relevant to all nations, including Scotland.
